item.name: Wind-up Godbert
item.description:
No less gentlemanly for its compact size, this mammet stands ever ready to do what only a Manderville can.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Godbert minion.
item.tooltip:
Splendidly suplexed, Lord Godbert!
   - Nashu Mhakaracca
item.specialactiondescription: Reduces HP of enemy Shield by 70%. No effect if Shield is already inoperable.
